payload.answer: I could not preserve the article itself because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.
payload.decision: No durable content memory committed because the article could not be retrieved; only the fetch failure context is retained.

entity_resolution.reason: No stable article entity could be resolved from the malformed URL and failed fetch result.

payload.intent: Attempted to remember an article from a malformed/failed URL, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch an article from a malformed URL resulted in a 404 network error, so the article content was not available for memory storage.

repair_options: Retry with a valid article URL

raw_text: {"intent":"Attempted to remember an article from a malformed/failed URL, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.","decision":"No durable content memory committed because the article could not be retrieved; only the fetch failure context is retained.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"event","statement":"An attempt to fetch an article from a malformed URL resulted in a 404 network error, so the article content was not available for memory storage.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"examplecom","type":"url_host","role":"part of requested URL"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"fetch attempt","predicate":"resulted_in","object":"404 network error"},{"subject":"article content","predicate":"unavailable_due_to","object":"fetch failure"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No stable article entity could be resolved from the malformed URL and failed fetch result."},"conflict_classification":"no_content_available","answer":"I could not preserve the article itself because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.","citations":["mock fetch result: 404 network error"],"repair_options":["Retry with a valid article URL","Provide the article text directly","Clarify the intended source URL"],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Fetch failed with 404 network error","No article content retrieved","No durable article memory committed"]}}
